pageContext.name: The Shire 3oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: This delightful coin featuring the Shire form part of the LORD OF THE RINGS™ Coin Collection is available to order now!   The 3oz pure silver engraved coin shows the full beauty of the Shire. The silver has been antiqued to provide further definition to the landscape. The effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II on the opposite side confirms all of them as legal tender.   Each limited-edition coin arrives in themed packaging. Each has a Certificate of Authenticity to confirm the coin's unique serial number and to guarantee the pureness of the silver.  These are treasured collectibles for any fan, a reminder of the extraordinary THE LORD OF THE RINGS™ trilogy. Make a promise to yourself to get one!
